response.justification: Bogdan has a solid ~20-year software engineering career with genuine entrepreneurial depth and broad technical range, but the role demands director-level AI strategy leadership with recognized domain expertise in cloud and AI — areas where the resume falls significantly short. AI involvement is limited to a single current role started in April 2025, with no demonstrated track record of building AI-powered products or platforms at scale. There is no advanced degree in an AI-related field, no evidence of advising enterprise customers on cloud/AI adoption, and no signal of the executive-facing influence required at this seniority level.
strengths: 20+ years of continuous software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — exceeds the 15-year minimum.
Genuine entrepreneurial experience as founder of GISCollective and through multiple early-stage startup roles, aligning with the preferred startup-within-larger-org profile.
Community knowledge-sharing track record (workshops, conference talks) demonstrates some capacity for external inspiration, relevant to the role's outreach responsibilities.
concerns: AI expertise is nascent and opportunistic — MCP tooling and agentic workflows at re:cinq started April 2025, with no prior AI/ML products, platforms, or research to substantiate 'recognized expertise.'
No cloud architecture or cloud platform strategy experience; the role centers on advising customers on cloud and AI adoption at a strategic, director-level scope.
Career trajectory is solidly individual-contributor and hands-on engineering; no evidence of customer advisory, partner engagement, or the executive-influence skills the position requires.
